title: CDN settings
subtitle: Cloudflare — status, settings and cache purge

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Enable the service and Cloudflare keys
settings.secretHint: Leave empty to keep the current token.
settings.noEditPermission: You don't have permission to edit CDN.

actions.title: Actions
actions.purgeAllConfirmText: All CDN cache will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
actions.noPurgePermission: You don't have permission to purge cache.

recommendations.title: CDN Cache Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: A practical Cloudflare setup guide for high-traffic news sites — based on Cloudflare Cache docs + industry best practices.
recommendations.donotHint: Bypass cache + bypass-on-cookie; never mark "Eligible for cache". Credentials / session / personalization → caching risks data leakage.
recommendations.longtermHint: Edge + Browser TTL = 1 year, immutable, Cache Reserve eligible, never purged — content-addressed filenames change on update.
recommendations.noticeText: When you create a new Zone in AlphaCMS, no Cache Rules, TTLs, or Cache Everything are applied automatically. Every Zone starts with no cache policy until the administrator configures it manually.
recommendations.disclaimer: Sourced from the official Cloudflare Cache documentation + industry best practices for high-traffic news. Verify plan-gated features in your Cloudflare dashboard before relying on them.
